observations.summary: The Dreamscape is described as a vast, ethereal, featureless gray light, echoing earlier descriptions of the Dreamscape as a boundless, formless realm where thought is substance and perception is key.

source_evidence.quote: The Dreamscape spread before him in ethereal gray light, featureless and vast.

target_evidence.quote: Though he was entering the Dreamscape—the sleeping mind of the world, a boundless place where thought was substance.
A place of raw, untamed power where thought gave substance to shadow and reality’s edges blurred.

accepted_observations.summary: The Dreamscape is described as a vast, ethereal, featureless gray light, echoing earlier descriptions of the Dreamscape as a boundless, formless realm where thought is substance and perception is key.

source_evidence.quote: The Dreamscape spread before him in ethereal gray light, featureless and vast.
